KILELESHWA POLICE STATION — OCCURRENCE BOOK EXTRACT
OB No. 33/30/06/24
Date: 30 June 2024
Time: 1500 hrs

Reporting officer: Cpl. Otieno (Service No. 78421)

Particulars:
On 30 June 2024 at 1430 hrs, the entire group of six suspects (Brian Kamau,
Faith Wanjiku, Musa Hassan, Cynthia Akinyi, Kevin Mutua, Aisha Mohammed)
arrested on 24 June 2024 in connection with the Finance Bill protests was
finally transferred to this station for consolidation pending production
in court the following day.

The advocate Wanjiku & Associates was informed at 1545 hrs. The advocate
attended the station and was permitted access for the first time since the
arrest. Bond papers were prepared but bond was not granted at the station;
the matter was directed to the Chief Magistrate, Milimani, for the
following day, 1 July 2024.

Signed: Cpl. Otieno
Counter-signed: IP Mwangi
